claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch supports research/fetch style evidence through agent_tool_profile configuration and scope-based evidence classification.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES = new Set(["project", "external", "user", "unknown"]) defines four allowed evidence scopes.
evidence.why: Evidence scope classification is core to separating project facts from external research.

evidence.summary: toolProfile.includes('research') conditional adds 'WebFetch/WebSearch are allowed for external research; mark those records as scope=external' to agent prompt.
evidence.why: Research profile enables external tools and instructs agents to mark external evidence correctly.

evidence.summary: executionConfig normalizes agent tool profiles including 'research' profile for Claude provider.
evidence.why: Tool profile normalization determines which agents get WebFetch/WebSearch access.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION defines evidence schema requiring scope field and explaining 'project facts require project-scoped evidence'.
evidence.why: Schema enforces scope declaration and documents project evidence requirements.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope function infers scope from record fields including URL pattern /^https?:\/\//i.test(url) returns 'external'.
evidence.why: Scope inference logic automatically detects external URLs as external evidence.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator checks for non-URL path field; evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope checks VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES.has(scope).
evidence.why: Validation functions ensure project evidence has concrete locators and declared scopes.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues returns PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker when evidence lacks project scope or path locator.
evidence.why: Blocking logic prevents external-only evidence from satisfying project fact requirements.

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: '任何 existing-project factual claim 如果只有 external/user/unknown evidence...都必须被 readiness blocker 拦住'
evidence.why: Product documentation confirms external evidence cannot alone prove project facts.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors validates each evidence record declares scope as project, external, user, or unknown.
evidence.why: Validation ensures all evidence records explicitly declare their scope.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult calls evidenceScopeErrors and adds scope errors to missing field with status='blocked'.
evidence.why: Agent result normalization blocks results with missing scope declarations.

risks: If scope validation logic has bugs, external evidence could be mistaken for project facts.
If tool profile normalization fails to recognize 'research' profile, WebFetch/WebSearch may not be available to evidence agents.

result.notes: Evidence scope classification and research profile support are implemented across router, dispatch, and doctrine. Project evidence requires path locators; external evidence is marked but cannot satisfy project fact requirements alone.
